name: tv.tootie/swag-mcp
title: SWAG MCP
description: MCP server for SWAG reverse proxy configuration generation and management.

environmentVariables.name: SWAG_MCP_PROXY_CONFS_URI
environmentVariables.description: URI to the SWAG proxy-confs directory. Supports local path, SSH (user@host:/path), or SCP with port (user@host:port:/path).
